title: A Visit to a Traditional Craft Village
content: Last weekend, my class went on a field trip to Bat Trang, a famous traditional craft village in Hanoi. The journey took about an hour by bus. When we arrived, we were amazed by the sight of colorful ceramics everywhere. We visited a local workshop where we watched the artisans shaping clay into beautiful bowls and vases. It was really fascinating to see how they created such wonderful products with their skillful hands. Later, we even had a chance to make our own pottery. I made a small cup, and although it was not perfect, I was very proud of it. At the end of the day, I bought a lovely vase as a souvenir for my mother because she loves flowers. The trip was educational and brought us a lot of joy.

title: Benefits of Reading Books
content: Reading books is one of the most beneficial habits a person can develop. Firstly, it broadens our knowledge. When we read, we learn about new cultures, historical events, and scientific discoveries. Secondly, reading helps to reduce stress. After a long day of studying or working, getting lost in a good story can make us forget our daily worries. It relaxes our mind and prepares us for a peaceful sleep. Moreover, reading improves our vocabulary and writing skills. By seeing how authors use words and sentences, we can learn to express ourselves better. Some students prefer watching videos, but reading requires active thinking, which keeps our brain sharp. Therefore, everyone should try to read for at least thirty minutes every day to enjoy these wonderful benefits.

title: A Memorable Camping Trip
content: Last summer, my friends and I decided to go camping in a national park. We arrived early in the morning when the air was still cool and fresh. First, we found a flat area near a small stream and set up our tents. It took us nearly an hour because we had never done it before. After that, we went hiking along a narrow trail to explore the forest. We saw many colorful birds and even a wild monkey jumping between the trees. In the evening, we gathered around a campfire. We roasted marshmallows, sang songs, and shared scary stories. The sky was clear, so we could see thousands of bright stars. We enjoyed the trip so much because it was a great chance to connect with nature and relax.

title: The Importance of Breakfast
content: Many people believe that breakfast is the most important meal of the day, and scientists agree. After a long night of sleep, our bodies need energy to start a new day. A healthy breakfast provides the essential nutrients and vitamins that help us stay focused and active. Studies show that students who eat a proper breakfast usually get better grades and behave better in class. On the other hand, skipping this meal can lead to tiredness and a lack of concentration. Unfortunately, many teenagers often skip breakfast because they wake up late and do not have enough time before school. To solve this problem, they should prepare a simple meal like bread, eggs, or milk the night before. Eating in the morning is a simple habit that brings great health benefits.

title: My Favorite Hobby
content: Gardening has been my favorite hobby since I was ten years old. It all started when my grandmother gave me a small pot of daisies. Now, I have a beautiful garden behind my house where I grow various kinds of flowers and organic vegetables. Every afternoon, I spend about an hour watering the plants, pulling out weeds, and checking for insects. It is a rewarding experience to watch a tiny seed grow into a big plant bearing fruits or flowers. Gardening also helps me stay active and healthy because it requires physical effort. Furthermore, it teaches me how to be patient, as plants need time to grow. I love eating the fresh tomatoes and cucumbers that I plant myself because they are much safer and tastier than those bought in the market.

title: A School Volunteer Campaign
content: Last Sunday, our school organized a volunteer campaign to clean up the local beach. More than two hundred students and teachers participated in this meaningful event. We gathered at the school gate at 6:30 a.m. and took buses to the destination. Upon arriving, we were divided into small groups. Each group was given trash bags, gloves, and tools to pick up rubbish. We worked hard for three hours and collected a huge amount of plastic bottles, food wrappers, and old fishing nets. It was shocking to see how much trash was left on the sand. By noon, the beach looked much cleaner and more beautiful. We organized this campaign because we wanted to raise people's awareness of environmental protection and keep our oceans safe for marine life.

title: The Role of Smartphones
content: In today's modern world, smartphones have become an indispensable part of our daily lives. They are not just devices for making phone calls or sending texts; they are powerful mini-computers. With a smartphone, people can easily access the Internet, read news, and stay connected with friends through social media. It is incredibly convenient to have maps, cameras, and music players all in one small gadget. However, using smartphones too much can cause some serious problems. Many teenagers spend hours staring at their screens, which can harm their eyesight and lead to a lack of sleep. Moreover, spending too much time online might reduce face-to-face interactions with family members. Therefore, it is important to use smartphones wisely and limit our screen time to maintain a healthy lifestyle.

title: Learning a Foreign Language
content: Learning a foreign language, especially English, offers numerous benefits in today's globalized world. First of all, it opens up a wide range of academic and career opportunities. Many top universities and international companies require candidates to have a good command of English. This language allows people to communicate easily with foreigners from different countries. Additionally, learning a new language is a great exercise for the brain. It improves our memory and enhances our problem-solving skills. When you study a language, you also learn about the culture, history, and customs of the people who speak it. Although mastering a foreign language can be difficult and takes a lot of time, it makes you more confident when traveling abroad and helps you understand the world better.

title: A School Trip to the Zoo
content: Yesterday, my classmates and I went on an exciting trip to the city zoo. The weather was sunny and pleasant, making it perfect for an outdoor activity. When we entered the zoo, we were immediately attracted by the loud roars of the lions. The zoo is a huge place with many different sections. We saw tall giraffes eating leaves from high branches, and playful monkeys swinging from tree to tree. The most interesting part was the reptile house, where we observed various snakes and crocodiles. The students were very excited because it was their first time seeing these wild animals in real life. We also learned a lot about animal conservation from the zoo guides. The trip ended late in the afternoon, leaving everyone tired but extremely happy.

title: An Enjoyable Trip to the Countryside
content:
I still remember spending an enjoyable day in the countryside a few months ago. This place was not very far from where I lived and it was easy to get there. It was a very beautiful place. There was a flowing river with clear water that made it more beautiful. 1 could see some cows roaming the field and eating grass. My brother and sister also went with me that day. With the sun shining and a blue sky over our heads, the day was perfect for enjoying the countryside. After arriving there, we relaxed and enjoyed the natural view around us first. Then we rented a boat and rode it into the river to do some fishing, and luckily, we caught some big fish. Finally, we decided to go for a walk in a beautiful small forest where we discovered a lot of birds and animals. We tried to count how many different kinds of birds and animals there were, but we failed because there were so many.
I really enjoyed our day out because it brought me close to a very peaceful and natural environment, away from the busy and noisy city life.

My name is Vy. I have a very busy week, but I always (1) ______ some time for my hobbies on Sundays. I (2) ______ playing indoor games to going out. My best friend, Lan, (3) ______ the same interests as me. We both (4) ______ making models together when we have free time.

However, there isn't (3) ______ entertainment like cinemas or shopping malls. Most children spend (4) ______ time playing in the fields.

title: Living Preferences

My grandfather (3) ______ tells us stories about the past when we sit together in the evening. We (4) ______ feel bored because there is always something interesting to hear.

title: Protecting the Environment
content: Environmental pollution is a serious problem. If we (1) ______ more trees, the air will become fresher. However, unless we (2) ______ using plastic bags, land pollution will get worse. If people (3) ______ trash into the river, the water (4) ______ polluted. We must act now to save our planet.

We should turn off the lights when leaving, (2) ______ we will waste a lot of energy. My brother likes planting trees, (3) ______ I prefer picking up trash on the beach. We are young, (4) ______ we want to do something meaningful for our community.

title: Water Conservation
content: We must save water every day (1) ______ we don't run out of this natural resource. Many people use low-flow showerheads (2) ______ they can save a lot of water. It's also important to fix leaking faucets (3) ______ we won't waste water unnecessarily. We take these small actions (4) ______ we can protect our planet for future generations.

title: Natural Disasters
content: Last night, a big earthquake hit the city. (1) ______ did it happen? It happened at 11:45 p.m. (2) ______ were you doing when the ground started shaking? I was sleeping in my bedroom. (3) ______ was the epicenter of the earthquake? It was near the mountain. (4) ______ should we do to stay safe? We should hide under a heavy table.

title: Emergency Kit
content: In case of a disaster, you should have an emergency kit ready. Keep your first aid kit (1) ______ the top shelf where it's easy to reach. Important documents should be stored (2) ______ a waterproof bag. You can put some bottles of water (3) ______ the bed or (4) ______ the kitchen cabinet. Being prepared will help you stay calm.

content: When the flood came, everyone had to move quickly. The rescue team rowed their boat (1) ______ the flooded street to save people. We saw a helicopter flying (2) ______ the buildings to look for survivors. Some people were climbing (3) ______ to the roof of their houses to wait for help. Finally, they were all pulled (4) ______ the water and taken to a safe shelter.

title: Smart Robots
content: Robots are becoming very popular in many families. (1) ______ your family have a robot? Yes, we do. We have a vacuum robot and a robot teacher. (2) ______ does the robot teacher look like? It looks like a human but with metallic skin. (3) ______ can it do for you? It can help me with my math homework and teach me English. (4) ______ you like having a robot at home? Of course! It's very helpful.

content: In modern factories, robots are replacing humans in many tasks. Robots can work (1) ______ and more accurately than people. For example, they can assemble car parts (2) ______ than human workers. Robots don't get tired, so they can perform repetitive jobs (3) ______ over a long period. Humans might solve creative problems (4) ______ than robots, but robots are better at speed and precision.

title: Alien Encounter
content: Last Saturday, I (1) ______ in my garden when I saw a strange light in the sky. It was very bright and moved silently. While I (2) ______ at the light, a small UFO suddenly (3) ______ on the grass. An alien stepped out and (4) ______ me with a friendly smile. I was terrified but also very curious.

Each group has (3) ______ unique culture and traditions. For example, the H'mong people often live in (4) ______ northern mountainous areas of the country.

content: I visited a Thai village last month and asked the locals some questions. I asked them (1) ______ they had any special festivals. They told me about the Xoe dance. Then I asked (2) ______ I could participate in the festival. They smiled and said yes. I also wanted to know (3) ______ the most famous traditional food was. Finally, I asked them (4) ______ they often wore their traditional costumes.
